creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

We are preparing for VirtualBox 4.0 update. If this problem still 
persists in 4.0 please create a new PR and we will try to find a 
solution. Closed because I got a few Solaris reports during the cft with 
4.0.4 and they had problems but not this one.
